summary: Implemented the Stage 6C Codex Exec launch-enabled path behind an injected runner, including process evidence preservation and Worker Result artifact gating.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_worker_backends.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 261 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

CodexExecBackend.run invokes codex --ver.evidence: The run path always calls preflight first. Access-denied preflight tests assert only the version command is invoked and result_path remains unset.

With launch_enabled true and successful.evidence: The launch-success test uses an injected runner that writes a Worker Result JSON, final message, JSONL, and diff summary; the backend preserves those files, captures stdout/stderr, and returns completed with result_path.

Exec nonzero exit and missing Worker Res.evidence: Focused tests cover nonzero exec returning codex_exec_failed and zero-exit missing result returning worker_result_missing while keeping stdout, stderr, JSONL, final-message, and diff-summary evidence paths.

Focused tests cover successful fake exec.evidence: tests/test_worker_backends.py includes launch success, launch failure, missing result, preflight failure, and launch-disabled no-live behavior.

risks: The live local Codex executable remains unavailable in this WindowsApps install because codex --version fails with Access is denied, so real launches must remain gated until a usable executable path and CODEX_HOME are confirmed.
Stage 6C proves launch process handling with injected runners only; worktree lifecycle setup and live diff capture remain future slices.
follow_up_tasks: Shape the next Stage 6/7 slice for trusted worktree launch orchestration, including executable/CODEX_HOME preflight evidence and artifact path ownership.
Add live-run gating or a HITL setup task for installing or resolving an accessible Codex CLI executable.
handoff_notes: Stage 6C is ready to close after full verification and planning ingestion. Live Codex launch remains disabled until the local CLI access-denied issue is resolved or an accessible executable is configured.
